sources.name: Switching Costs
sources.rationale: dominant segment at 91.0% of revenue (deep ecosystem lock-in); operating margin 66% vs 25% industry (extreme pricing power); gross margins 74% indicate premium pricing / low substitution

sources.name: Intangible Assets
sources.rationale: R&D spending growing at 43% YoY (heavy innovation investment); premium gross margins 74% reflect brand/IP power; large revenue base (253B) enables sustained IP investment

sources.name: Network Effect
sources.rationale: platform-centric business (data center at 91.0%); explosive 85% revenue growth (flywheel spinning); high EPS growth 214% (operating leverage from scale)

sources.name: Cost Advantage
sources.rationale: gross margins 74% well above 50% industry; operating margin 66% vs 25% (extreme efficiency); massive scale ($253B revenue) enables fixed-cost absorption

sources.name: Efficient Scale
sources.rationale: Data Center at 91.0% share (near-monopoly position); premium 74% gross margins sustained (high barriers); $100B+ revenue scale creates massive entry barrier

analysis: Switching Costs and Intangible Assets and Network Effect create a durable competitive fortress. The company's moat is reinforced by multiple reinforcing factors, making it unlikely competitors can erode its position in the next decade.
